title: Natural killer cell depletion in vivo (mouse)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"ae5jj","text":"This protocol describes a validated procedure for antibody depletion of natural killer cells in mice (C57Bl/6J and 129SvEv strains), combined with the injection of cancer cells i.v. It is based on combining a few references and testing the optimal antibody concentration and frequency of injection to achieve good level of depletion, minimise animal injection frequency, and reagent consumption. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"d9fuo","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9iuu1","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"5o8h1","text":"Before starting the experiment, validate the level od depletion of your batch of antibody by FACS (use spleen or blood sample to check the number of NK cells  4 or 7 days after antibody administration). Make sure to use a staining antibody for a marker other than the one targeted with a depletion antibody. I use Nkp46. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fu69a","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"12nrv","text":"My protocol is based on depleting the NK cells for 4 days (two doses) before injecting tumour cells, followed by a weekly administration of the depleting antibody afterwards. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7qvh8","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6dlh","text":"This schedule should be checked and adapted for any other setting/experiment. steps: Mice will receive an i.p. injection of the antibody in 200 µl PBS (Day 1) e.g. Monday
Mice will receive an i.p. injection of the antibody in 200 µl PBS (Day 4) e.g. Thursday
Mice will receive tail vein injection of the cell suspension in 100 µl PBS (Day 5) e.g. Friday
Mice will receive an i.p. injection of the antibody in 200 µl PBS (Day 11, 18, 25) i.e. once per week
Mice will be culled after 28 days from the day of tumour cell injection or at an appropriate time-point for any particular experimental setting.
creator: Goran Tomic
